Module 2: The PS Path, Part 2:
Going Meta
!
Executive Summary
!
We’re now going to dig into the advanced portion of PS Path. If you recall
the classic “Problem-Agitate-Solve”, remember that some agitation is still
required.
In most classic “Hollywood” stories, there is a moment where they hit rock
bottom. Eventually, they come back up. There’s a clear beginning, middle,
and end.
Once you define the problem it’s important to agitate. There is always one
grand meta problem-solution. Within that there are mini problem-solutions
that you’ll solve and weave into the grander story.
The smaller problems are educating the prospect on what their problems
are, i.e. what they don’t know or are ignorant about. e.g. people don’t know
about the many different types of problems.
!
